userMessage: We want to tokenize a portfolio. Which supported protocol base should we use if we have 50 whitelisted investor wallets and need daily valuation/performance updates?

conversationHistory.content: I am an asset manager preparing a tokenized portfolio demo.
We should clarify protocol choice, wallet whitelist, valuation updates, and testnet deployment gates before PRD generation.

projectContext.tokenizationObjective: Tokenize a portfolio for a local funding-demo MVP
